title: Be able to view archived jobs on mobile app.
excerpt: Our maintenance teams are always on the go and need to view archived jobs from their mobile device because this is the device they use the most when inputting jobs and data.

posts.author: Rawlings (Kevin)
posts.cookedHtml: Our maintenance teams are always on the go and need to view archived jobs from their mobile device because this is the device they use the most when inputting jobs and data.
